properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: It's the dawning of a new day The Daystar has risen in our hearts Now the cold stiff dead body Has quickening transforming power From death unto life we have passed Into this bright eternal day Now the resurrected Christ in us lives.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Hallelujah He is risen He is alive in me to tell From the realm of this old earthly, Now I live in the heavenly realm And soon I'll change dimension For this earth won't be able To hold me anymore.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Now the glory of His gospel Shines through us wherever we may go, Changing ugly caterpillar Into beautiful heavenly creature, Oh death, you've been conquered by Him Our victory and promise is sure, Now the gates of hell cannot prevail For we are the Bride of the living God.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: This the season of immortals, The spring sun has returned, The restoration of the Bride is on, All that's lost He has brought back And unto the resurrection we are heading now, To awake the saints that sleepeth And forever we will be with you Lord.
